revision.comment: Chaotic Enby moved page [[Template:Infobox Korean]] to [[Template:Infobox Korean/base]] over redirect: Perform technical move requested at [[WP:RM/TR]] ([[Special:Permalink/1326548490|permalink]])
revision.text:
{{Infobox | child = yes | headerstyle = background-color: {{#if: {{{headercolor|}}} | {{{headercolor|}}} | #b0c4de }}; color:inherit; | labelstyle = font-weight: {{{fontstyle|normal}}}; | header1 = {{#ifeq: {{{header|{{{korean_header|}}}}}}|none||{{{header|{{{korean_header|Korean name}}}}}}}} | label2 = {{#switch: {{{northkorea|}}}|yes=[[Hangul|Chosŏn'gŭl]]|old=[[Hunminjeongeum]]|#default=[[Hangul]]}} | data2 = {{#if: {{{hangul|}}} |
{{lang|ko-Hang|{{{hangul}}} }}
}} | label3 = {{#switch:{{{northkorea|}}}|yes=[[Hanja|Hancha]]|#default=[[Hanja]]}} | data3 = {{#if: {{{hanja|}}} |
{{lang|ko-Hani|{{{hanja}}} }}
}} | label4 = Literal meaning | data4 = {{{lk|}}} | label6 = [[Revised Romanization of Korean|Revised Romanization]] | data6 = {{#if: {{{rr|}}} | {{transliteration|ko|rr|{{{rr}}} }} }} | label7 = [[McCune–Reischauer]] | data7 = {{#if: {{{mr|}}} | {{transliteration|ko|mr|{{{mr}}} }} }} | label8 = [[Help:IPA/Korean|IPA]] | data8 = {{{koreanipa|}}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using infobox Korean with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Infobox Korean]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| fontstyle | hangul | hanja | header | headercolor | korean_header | koreanipa | lk | mr | northkorea | rr }} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting the contents of [[Template:Infobox Chinese]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox | child = yes | headerstyle = background-color: {{#if: {{{headercolor|}}} | {{{headercolor|}}} | #b0c4de }}; color:inherit; | labelstyle = font-weight: {{{fontstyle|normal}}}; | header1 = {{#ifeq: {{{header|{{{korean_header|}}}}}}|none||{{{header|{{{korean_header|Korean name}}}}}}}} | label2 = {{#switch: {{{northkorea|}}}|yes=[[Hangul|Chosŏn'gŭl]]|old=[[Hunminjeongeum]]|#default=[[Hangul]]}} | data2 = {{#if: {{{hangul|}}} |

revision.comment: Bot: convert 2 straggler wikilink(s) to {{ill}} (resolved via Wikidata); add wikidata link from enwiki Template:Infobox Korean/base (Q15831442); sync sitelinks from Wikidata (+19, -1); check_date=2026-05-24 [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/26362512471|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox | child = yes | headerstyle = background-color: {{#if: {{{headercolor|}}} | {{{headercolor|}}} | #b0c4de }}; color:inherit; | labelstyle = font-weight: {{{fontstyle|normal}}}; | header1 = {{#ifeq: {{{header|{{{korean_header|}}}}}}|none||{{{header|{{{korean_header|Korean name}}}}}}}} | label2 = {{#switch: {{{northkorea|}}}|yes=[[Hangul|Chosŏn'gŭl]]|old=[[Hunminjeongeum]]|#default=[[Hangul]]}} | data2 = {{#if: {{{hangul|}}} |
{{lang|ko-Hang|{{{hangul}}} }}
}} | label3 = {{#switch:{{{northkorea|}}}|yes=[[Hanja|Hancha]]|#default=[[Hanja]]}} | data3 = {{#if: {{{hanja|}}} |
{{lang|ko-Hani|{{{hanja}}} }}
}} | label4 = Literal meaning | data4 = {{{lk|}}} | label6 = {{ill|Revised Romanization of Korean|ar|رومنة كورية منقحة|ast|Romanización revisada del coreanu|bn|কোরীয় ভাষার সংশোধিত রোমানীকরণ|ca|Romanització revisada del coreà|da|Revideret romanisering af koreansk|de|Revidierte Romanisierung|en|Revised Romanization of Korean|eo|Revizia latinliteriga transskribo de la korea lingvo|es|Romanización revisada del coreano|eu|Koreeraren erromanizazio berritu|fa|لاتین‌نویسی کره‌ای اصلاح‌شده|fi|Korean uudistettu latinisaatio|fr|Romanisation révisée du coréen|gl|Romanización revisada do coreano|he|הליטון הקוריאני המחודש|hu|A koreai nyelv átdolgozott latin betűs átírása|hy|Կորեերենի նոր ռոմանականացում|id|Alih Aksara Korea yang Disempurnakan|it|Latinizzazione riveduta della lingua coreana|ja|文化観光部2000年式|jv|Alihaksara Koréa Kang Sinampurna|ko|국어의 로마자 표기법|ks|رِوایزٕڈ رومنَیزیشن آف کورین|mk|Преработена романизација на корејскиот јазик|ms|Perumian Semakan Bahasa Korea|nl|Herziene Koreaanse Romanisatie|no|Revidert romanisering av koreansk|pl|Transkrypcja poprawiona języka koreańskiego|pt|Romanização revisada da língua coreana|ro|Romanizarea revizuită a limbii coreene|ru|Новая романизация корейского языка|si|ප්‍රතිශෝධිත රෝමානුකෘත කොරියන් භාෂාව|simple|Revised Romanization of Korean|su|Alih Aksara Koréa anu Disampurnakeun|sv|Reviderad romanisering av koreanska|th|ระบบกระทรวงวัฒนธรรมเกาหลี 2000|tl|Binagong Romanisasyon ng Koreano|tr|Korecenin Revize Edilmiş Romanizasyonu|uk|Нова латинізація корейської мови|vi|Romaja quốc
